servinfo.title: BCM Registration (Ignition Switch Model)
servinfo.ptxt: After BCM is replaced with new one, register ignition key ID code in BCM using SUZUKI scan tool and immobilizer cable.

s1.ptxt: Prepare all of ignition keys ready for registration.
Perform “Immobilizer Key Registration” in “Immobilizer” menu indicated on SUZUKI scan tool. Refer to “SUZUKI SDT Immobilizer Control System Operator’s Manual”.

attention3.ptxt: When ECM and BCM are replaced with new ones at the same time, perform “Immobilizer Key Registration” instead of “ECM Registration” using SUZUKI scan tool and immobilizer cable. Refer to “SUZUKI SDT Immobilizer Control System Operator’s Manual” for the immobilizer registration.
